commit_scope: Move GET /api/utils/kernel_status from FastAPI public routing into the BML front-door native route service.

local_validation.summary: The BML front-door catalog now defines api_kernel_status and KernelStatusRoute for GET /api/utils/kernel_status. The Hostinger Traefik overlay routes that exact public path to kernel-router-bml-front-door, and both deploy verification scripts require X-Form-Router:native-kernel, X-Form-Handler:api_kernel_status, X-Form-Python-Authority:false, and a body with active=native-kernel, router=native-kernel, python_authority=false.

observed_delta.before_public_probe: Production GET /api/utils/kernel_status returned FastAPI bridge JSON with active=inline and no X-Form-Router header.
observed_delta.local_front_door_probe: HTTP/1.1 200 OK with X-Form-Router:native-kernel, X-Form-Handler:api_kernel_status, X-Form-Python-Authority:false, and body {"active":"native-kernel",...,"python_authority":false,"runtime":"form-kernel-rust"}.
observed_delta.public_route_binding: docker-compose.kernel-router.yml adds a high-priority Traefik router for Host(api.coherencycoin.com) && Method(GET) && Path(/api/utils/kernel_status) to the BML front-door service.

known_limitations.observed: form-kernel-rust check --routes deploy/front-door/api.bml still reports the same 14 unresolved full-catalog names on origin/main and on this branch. The focused serve proof validates this route through the same BML front-door serving path used by prior public native route slices.

deploy_validation.notes: Post-merge deploy must show the public route no longer returns FastAPI bridge status.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Public GET /api/utils/kernel_status is invited into the native BML front door by default instead of being served by FastAPI.
test_flows: Run the BML front-door router locally and curl /api/utils/kernel_status.
Require native router, handler, and python-authority headers.

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete. PR checks, merge, deploy, and public verification remain before claiming public release.
